title: Just Peachy Giveaway
excerpt: Peachy Cheap is a daily deals site and today they are offering 3 daybooks for the price of 1! For Daybook inspiration you can check out this tag here on the blog and Daybook Delights on Facebook . Check out…
body:
Peachy Cheap is a daily deals site and today they are offering 3 daybooks for the price of 1! For Daybook inspiration you can check out this tag here on the blog and Daybook Delights on Facebook. Check out www.peachycheap.com to grab this deal.

GIVEAWAY IS NOW CLOSED || As part of the fun, Peachy Cheap wants to give away a goodie bag filled with over $100.00 in product! To enter, simply leave a comment telling us something peachy (good, in my book). Comments will close Monday, February 11 at 7am and a winner will be announced on this post shortly after. Good luck!

Winner is: #27 - Megan @ The Nerd Nest says: February 8, 2013 at 7:26 am Morning snuggles with my toddler make life peachy! Love this deal, bought it as soon as it was announced on Peachy Cheap. Excited to work with your awesome books, Amy! CONGRATS!
